description: You are a cybersecurity analyst responding to a server intrusion. Using the raw web server log file at '/home/ga/Documents/data/server_access_logs.csv', identify the attacker and determine what data was stolen. Create a SQLite database named 'Investigation' at '/home/ga/Documents/databases/investigation.db' with a table named 'web_logs' containing the imported data. Identify the 'Attacker IP' characterized by a high volume of '404 Not Found' errors and export a report of their successful access records (status_code 200) to '/home/ga/Documents/exports/breach_evidence.csv'. The report must include the 'timestamp', 'endpoint', and 'status_code' columns.
